name: get_hospitals_high_insurance_coverage
description: Find hospitals with high insurance claim approval rates. Use this when users ask for insurance-friendly hospitals, good coverage, reliable insurance processing, or high claim approval. Returns hospitals sorted by approval rate with claim statistics.

min_approval_rate.description: Minimum claim approval rate. Use 0.9 for 'excellent coverage', 0.85 for 'very good coverage', 0.8 for 'good coverage'. Default is 0.8 (80%). Range: 0.0 to 1.0
